terrain_notes: First pacer leg — climbing, mostly daylight into evening. I may nap at Barker after. Plan has me at Sierra (~52 mi) by Saturday midnight and picking you up here Saturday afternoon-ish.
what_to_bring: GPX of course on your own device
Warm layers — gets cold up high

terrain_notes: Barker → Stephen Jones (7.5 mi, no crew) → Tahoe City (19.4 mi). Long leg — fresh pacer helps. Overnight into Sunday.
Big climb — 3,476 ft up. Sunday afternoon into evening. Sleep stop at Brockway after.
what_to_bring: Patience — I'll be deep in the pain cave

terrain_notes: Mostly down (~3,142 ft loss). Sunday night into Monday morning. Quads may be angry.
what_to_bring: Trekking poles if you use them

terrain_notes: Longest climb on the back half. Monday morning. Probably the hardest mental leg.
what_to_bring: Whatever gets you through a long grind

terrain_notes: Last ~18 miles to the buckle. Monday late morning into evening (plan ~6 PM finish). Good pacer here — keep the wheels on.
